---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Base Radar
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? What's frustrating, missing, or slow today?
(Link to related discussion or the relevant milestone in
[docs/ROADMAP.md](../../docs/ROADMAP.md) if applicable.)

## Proposal

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. Be as concrete as you
can — what would the user actually see or do differently?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is this one preferable?
("None" is a fine answer if this is the only reasonable approach.)

## Additional Context

Mockups, links, related issues, or anything else that helps explain the
request. If this touches an existing architectural layer, see
[docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) first and note how it
fits in.
